selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines, it is important to approach the topic with empathy and respect for differing opinions. Listen actively and ask questions to clarify any misconceptions or concerns. Avoid being confrontational or argumentative, as this can escalate the situation. Instead, focus on providing accurate and evidence-based information, while also acknowledging areas of uncertainty or disagreement. By taking a thoughtful and empathetic approach, it is possible to facilitate constructive dialogue and find common ground, even in the face of strongly held beliefs or opinions.",
"reasoning_summary": "To manage and deal with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines, approach the topic with empathy and respect for differing opinions. Listen actively and ask questions to clarify any misconceptions or concerns. Avoid being confrontational or argumentative, instead focus on providing accurate and evidence-based information while acknowledging areas of uncertainty or disagreement.",
"tone": "informative",
"citations": [],
"safety_notes": "",
"used_persona_fields": []
}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines, it is important to approach the topic with empathy and respect for differing opinions. Listen actively and ask questions to clarify any misconceptions or concerns. Avoid being confrontational or argumentative, as this can escalate the situation. Instead, focus on providing accurate and evidence-based information, while also acknowledging areas of uncertainty or disagreement. By taking a thoughtful and empathetic approach, it is possible to facilitate constructive dialogue and find common ground, even in the face of strongly held beliefs or opinions.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines, approach the topic with empathy and respect for differing opinions. Listen actively and ask questions to clarify any misconceptions or concerns. Avoid being confrontational or argumentative, instead focus on providing accurate and evidence-based information while acknowledging areas of uncertainty or disagreement.
